channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Real 'Flight 93' Election
item.description: The stakes in 2028 actually could be existential.

item.title: Vance urges Iran to accept a deal or face 'option B': 'We're locked and loaded'
item.description: Vice President J.D. Vance said Tuesday that Iran must choose between a peace deal preventing nuclear weapons or a more severe alternative.

item.title: Luigi Mangione supporters exploit Mamdani's press-pass leniency
item.description: These women are ideologues posing as journalists.

item.title: 23 state attorneys general investigate federal judicial center's distribution of 'biased' climate guide to judges
item.description: The chapter functions as an ex parte brief for one side of an ongoing debate, rather than an objective scientific guide.
